# CTFramePathFillRule.windingNumber

**Case**

Paints the area using the nonzero winding number rule.

## Declaration

```swift
case windingNumber
```

## Discussion

Text is filled in the area that would be painted if the path were given to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGContextFillPath].

## Enumeration Cases

- **CTFramePathFillRule.evenOdd**: Paints the area using the even-odd fill rule.

items.description: Paints the area using the even-odd fill rule.
